form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at this track on January 18 over 1408m, 13 len behind Carvellian Quest with 53.5kg at $8.30. When resuming last campaign ran last in a small field at Saratoga Turf on August 8 over 1106m, 11 len behind Billionaires Row carrying 54.5kg at $8.40. Will take a lot from this run but stays under notice.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd in a small field at this track on March 22 over 1308m, 1.5 len behind Tarpaulin with 57kg at $7.27. The race before that 2nd in a small field at this track on February 21 over 1408m, 1.75 len behind Last Man Standing with 56kg at $5.50. Plenty to like about his prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran last in a small field at Laurel on March 20 over 1207m, 11 len behind Firmantown carrying 55kg at $2.20. Previously second-up second last of 9 at Churchill Downs on November 30 over 1207m, 9 len behind Sharp Swinger carrying 55.5kg at $9.34. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run 3rd of 7 at this track on March 13 over 1207m, 1.75 len behind Nabokov with 56kg at $7.55. The race before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 15 over 1207m, 9 len behind Kid Billy carrying 56kg at $7.81. Big chance this time around.
